items.summary: Create a standalone, self-contained single HTML file (frontend/public/standalone.html) that duplicates the full current application. The file must inline all CSS (Tailwind via CDN or inlined styles), all JavaScript logic (React via CDN UMD builds), all UI content, translations, and mock/static data so it runs without any backend canister or build toolchain. All fonts, icons, and assets must be loaded via CDN links or inlined as base64 data URIs. The file should be fully functional as a static preview/demo with hardcoded sample data replacing backend calls.
